SEARCH
Package product

Class Product

java.lang.Object
product.Product
Direct Known Subclasses:
SecondHandProduct, StoreProduct
public abstract class Product extends Object
It implements the abstract Product class
Version:
1.9
Author:
Ana O.R.

  • Field Details

    • totalId

      public static int totalId
      The global variable to determine which id should a new product have

  • Constructor Details

    • Product

      public Product(String id, double price, String name, String description, String photo, ProductType type) throws IllegalArgumentException, NullPointerException
      A product's general constructor
      Parameters:
      id - the product's id
      price - the product's price
      name - the product's name
      description - the product's description
      photo - the product's photo's path
      type - the product's type
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - price was negative
      NullPointerException - name, description or photo's path were null

    • Product

      public Product(double price, String name, String description, String photo, ProductType type) throws IllegalArgumentException, NullPointerException
      A product's constructor
      Parameters:
      price - the product's price
      name - the product's name
      description - the product's description
      photo - the product's photo's path
      type - the product's type
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - price was negative
      NullPointerException - name, description or photo's path were null

    • bigPrintInfo

      It prints the product's info when seen individually

      public void setDescription(String newDescription) throws NullPointerException
      It allows for an employee to change a product's description

      Throws:
      NullPointerException - description was null
